query: SELECT id, portfolioId, type, ticker, shares, pricePerShare, currency, fxRate, totalAmountCHF, notes FROM portfolioTransactions WHERE portfolioId = (SELECT id FROM portfolios WHERE name = 'Test Portfolio Marc' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY id;
